title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 18 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 18 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 18 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 18/10/2023
DCE iron ore futures market falling trends by 0.4%. the main contract I2401 closed 861, some traders were negative to sell,Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, total transactions remained insipid. PBF at Shandong port dealt 929-940 yuan/mt; decreased 5-15 yuan/mt over yesterday.
